evaluators.name: RFQ Stainless Shaft Tight Tolerance & Lead Time Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted an RFQ for a CNC-turned stainless shaft (120 x 20 mm, qty 250) with tolerance ≤ ±0.02 mm and a standard lead time ≤ 15 business days.

evaluators.name: 5-Axis Aluminum Tightest Tolerance Sample Project Inquiry Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user contacted a 5-axis aluminum service that meets ≤ ±0.005 in tolerance and chose the tightest available aluminum tolerance while requesting a sample project.

evaluators.name: Medical Cost Estimator Titanium vs Stainless Preferred Material Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created cost estimates for titanium and stainless medical parts at qty 100 with fine finish, and marked as preferred the cheaper option under $40/unit.

evaluators.name: Aerospace Case Study Similar Project Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user started a similar project from an aerospace case study with delivery ≤ 10 days, referenced that case study, and targeted a delivery time ≤ 10 days.

evaluators.name: Equipment Comparison of Three Qualifying CNC Machines Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the current active equipment comparison contains three CNC machines that each support part length ≥ 500 mm and Ra ≤ 1.6 µm, and that they are the first three by newest commission date among all qualifying machines.

evaluators.name: Plant Tour Weekday Morning Next-Month Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a plant tour request for 3 attendees on a weekday morning on a date within the next calendar month relative to the baseline date.

evaluators.name: Cart with 2 Turning and 1 Milling Part Under $150 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the open cart contains exactly three line items: two CNC turning parts and one CNC milling part, each priced under $150 with quantity 1.

evaluators.name: Lead-Time Calculator 500 Parts with Anodizing & Inspection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user ran a lead-time calculation for 500 parts with anodizing and dimensional inspection, then selected the cheapest shipping option whose total lead time is ≤ 12 business days.
